description: Style Note Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. Wear this piece   with leggings and delicate sandals.  Product Details Blue kurta with a round neck, short sleeves, cut-out design on the front and a curved hem Material and Care 100% Viscose Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 5'8 and chest 32) is wearing a size WS
